tagline: Henry County's trusted heating and cooling team. Honest quotes, on-time service, free estimates.
address: 169 Stroud Rd, McDonough, GA 30252 (also serving from 452 Wehunt Rd, Covington, GA 30016)
services_intro: Locally owned and operated, serving McDonough, Stockbridge, and Covington for over a decade. Repairs, replacements, and seasonal maintenance — done right the first time.
service_1_desc: Diagnosis and repair of central air conditioning systems for homes across Henry County. We pinpoint the problem and fix it right.
service_2_desc: Furnace and heat-system repair, maintenance, and seasonal tune-ups to keep your home warm and your system running efficiently all winter.
service_3_desc: New heating and air system installation and replacement with free project estimates. Right-sized equipment, clean install, fair pricing.
review_1_quote: Showed up on time, explained exactly what was wrong, and had our AC running again the same afternoon. Fair price and no upsell.
review_2_quote: Elijah and his crew installed our new system and did it clean. They stand behind their work and answer the phone when you call.
review_3_quote: Been using them for years for both our furnace tune-ups and AC. Always honest, always on time. Wouldn't call anyone else.
about_paragraph: Coker Heating & Air is a locally owned and operated HVAC company that has served Henry County — McDonough, Stockbridge, and Covington — for over twelve years. Led by Elijah Coker, the company is built on three simple rules: show up when you say you will, quote the work honestly, and stand behind everything you do. From a hot July afternoon to a cold January morning, you get the same straight answer and fair price.
